title: Kaiju Hachi-go (Kaiju No. 8)
description: Kaiju Hachi-go (Kaiju No. 8) is a RPG Modpack for players wanting to become a member of the defense force and jump into the world of Kaiju No. 8.
body:
![Kaiju Hachi-go (Kaiju No. 8) SS 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OHOB9njY/images/b18ad6ebd7e0f5f0513a2b32ecc95a4a3a7231b9.png)
# Overview
**Kaiju Hachi-go (Kaiju No. 8)** is a Sci-fi themed Modpack based on the anime/manga "Kaiju Hachi-go (Kaiju No. 8)". Put on your defence force uniform and stand up to the Kaiju in this world! Choose your path, go from cadet to captain or perhaps take a more kaiju approach... With a progression system, points to power up certain abilities and a variety of unique weapons, combat styles and Kaiju, your next fight is never far away...

[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/kaijhachig)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/kaijhachig)
[![kofi-plural-alt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-plural-alt_vector.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/kesselot)
# Features
- [✔️] **Kaiju No. 8** - Enjoy a world based after your favourite manga/anime, from characters to weapons to Kaiju and more...
- [✔️] **Performance** - Don't let that pesky performance get in the way of your fun! Enjoy a fully optimised pack for all systems, shaders too!
- [✔️] **Cities** - Fight in the streets, the buildings and more! Use your terrain to your advantage from sprawling street fights to high-rise, your next battle awaits you.

## Screenshots - Check Gallery for more!

![Kaiju Hachi-go (Kaiju No. 8) SS 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OHOB9njY/images/fba58f939982f528ca5e5d49c13596a9b2837818.png)

### Modpack Notes
- **If you are a Youtuber or Content Creator playing this Modpack, put a link in the description linking back to this page so people know the Modpack you are using.**
- **Reupload of this Modpack or any modified version is not allowed allowed on Modrinth or CurseForge, this includes redistribution to any other website.** (_Unless given explicit permission by myself_)
